The application portal* for 2027 entrance will open in September 2026. Only completed applications are sent for committee review. *The application portal may close early if the cohort is filled. Next Application Deadlines: Coming soon! Letters of Recommendation The MS in Applied Data Science program requires two letters of recommendation. We strongly recommend that at least one letter is written by someone such as a direct manager/supervisor or internship supervisor who can attest to skills you demonstrated or gained though a professional workplace experience (e.g., leadership, teamwork, collaboration, initiative, management, other). Note: Letters of recommendation can be uploaded after you submit your application. Recommended sources for letters of recommendation include: professors; supervisors or managers; professional mentors. We do not accept letters of recommendation from family members, friends, or peers. Candidate Statement The candidate statement is a key part of your application. items.evidenceExcerpt: needed to meet our English Language Proficiency Requirement Application Fee There is a $90.00 non-refundable application fee. For all questions regarding fee waivers, please refer to the Physical Sciences Division fee waiver policy . Standardized Test Scores The Physical Sciences Division (PSD) does not require the GRE or other standardized test scores for admission into the MSDS or PhD programs. Applicants may choose to submit scores if they have already completed a standardized exam but it is not required that you do so. For those who plan to submit the GRE, please be advised that it will only be considered valid if the exam was taken within five (5) years prior to the application deadline. The Educational Testing Service (ETS) institutional code for the University of Chicago is 1832. Application Deadlines Below are the deadlines for prospective students applying for our Fall 2027 quarter. Please note that we do not admit candidates in any other term beyond the Fall quarter. All application materials must be submitted by the dates below in order to be considered for admission.
